Name: Accountant
Description: Reference to the accountant of the customer. Conditions: The referred accountant must have value > 0 in the field IsAccountant

Name: ActivitySector
Description: Reference to Activity sector of the account

Name: ActivitySubSector
Description: Reference to Activity sub-sector of the account

Name: AutomaticProcessProposedEntry
Description: Automatically create entries for complete entry proposals

Name: Blocked
Description: Indicates if the account is blocked

Name: BSN
Description: Citizen Service Number for the Netherlands

Name: BusinessType
Description: Reference to the business type of the account

Name: CanDropShip
Description: Indicates the default for the possibility to drop ship when an item is linked to a supplier

Name: Code
Description: Unique key, fixed length numeric string with leading spaces, length 18. IMPORTANT: When you use OData $filter on this field you have to make sure the filter parameter contains the leading spaces

Name: CodeAtSupplier
Description: Code under which your own company is known at the account

Name: CompanySize
Description: Reference to Company size of the account

Name: ConsolidationScenario
Description: Consolidation scenario (Time & Billing). Values: 0 = No consolidation, 1 = Item, 2 = Item + Project, 3 = Item + Employee, 4 = Item + Employee + Project, 5 = Project + WBS + Item, 6 = Project + WBS + Item + Employee. Item means in this case including Unit and Price, these also have to be the same to consolidate

Name: ControlledDate
Description: Date of the latest control of account data with external web service

Name: CreditLinePurchase
Description: Maximum amount of credit for Purchase. If no value has been defined, there is no credit limit

Name: CreditLineSales
Description: Maximum amount of credit for sales. If no value has been defined, there is no credit limit

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: DatevCreditorCode
Description: DATEV creditor code for Germany legislation

Name: DatevDebtorCode
Description: DATEV debtor code for Germany legislation

Name: DeliveryAdvice
Description: Indicates how deliveries are handled. Values: 0 = Partial, orders can be delivered partial, 1 = Complete the order needs to be complete to deliver, 2 = Partial without backorder when deliver partially the remainder of the order is completed without delivery

Name: DiscountPurchase
Description: Default discount percentage for purchase. This is stored as a fraction. ie 5.5% is stored as .055

Name: DiscountSales
Description: Default discount percentage for sales. This is stored as a fraction. ie 5.5% is stored as .055

Name: EnableSalesPaymentLink
Description: Indicates whether payment link is activated for sales

Name: EndDate
Description: Determines in combination with the start date if the account is active. If the current date is > end date the account is inactive

Name: GLAccountPurchase
Description: Default (corporate) GL offset account for purchase (cost)

Name: GLAccountSales
Description: Default (corporate) GL offset account for sales (revenue)

Name: GLAP
Description: Default GL account for Accounts Payable

Name: GLAR
Description: Default GL account for Accounts Receivable

Name: GlnNumber
Description: Global Location Number can be used by companies to identify their locations, giving them complete flexibility to identify any type or level of location required

Name: HasWithholdingTaxSales
Description: Indicates whether a customer has withholding tax on sales

Name: IgnoreDatevWarningMessage
Description: Suppressed warning message when there is duplication on the DATEV code

Name: IncotermVersionPurchase
Description: Version of Incoterm for Purchase Supported version for Incoterms : 2010, 2020

Name: IncotermVersionSales
Description: Version of Incoterm for Sales Supported version for Incoterms : 2010, 2020

Name: InvoiceAccount
Description: ID of account to be invoiced instead of this account

Name: InvoiceAttachmentType
Description: Indicates which attachment types should be sent when a sales invoice is printed. Only values in related table with Invoice=1 are allowed

Name: InvoicingMethod
Description: Method of sending for sales invoices. Values: 1: Paper, 2: EMail, 4: Mailbox (electronic exchange), 8: Send and track, 32: Send via Peppol Take notes: To use the '4 - Mailbox (electronic exchange)' option, the 'Mailbox' feature set is required in the licence. To use the '32 - Send via Peppol' option, e-invoicing via Peppol must be activated

Name: IsAccountant
Description: Indicates whether the account is an accountant. Values: 0 = No accountant, 1 = True, but accountant doesn't want his name to be published in the list of accountants, 2 = True, and accountant is published in the list of accountants

Name: IsAgency
Description: Indicates whether the accounti is an agency

Name: IsAnonymised
Description: Indicates whtether the account is anonymised.

Name: IsCompetitor
Description: Indicates whether the account is a competitor

Name: IsExtraDuty
Description: Indicates whether a customer is eligible for extra duty

Name: IsMailing
Description: Indicates if the account is excluded from mailing marketing information

Name: IsPilot
Description: Indicates whether the account is a pilot account

Name: IsReseller
Description: Indicates whether the account is a reseller

Name: IsSales
Description: Indicates whether the account is allowed for sales

Name: IsSupplier
Description: Indicates whether the account is a supplier

Name: LeadPurpose
Description: Reference to Lead purpose of an account

Name: LeadSource
Description: Reference to Lead source of an account

Name: LogoFileName
Description: The file name (without path, but with extension) of the image

Name: PayAsYouEarn
Description: Indicates the loan repayment plan for UK legislation

Name: PaymentConditionPurchase
Description: Code of default payment condition for purchase

Name: PaymentConditionSales
Description: Code of default payment condition for sales

Name: PeppolIdentifier
Description: Peppol identifier user entered manually, corresponds to picked peppol adress

Name: PeppolIdentifierType
Description: Peppol identifier type that user picked manually - GLN, COC, etc

Name: PriceList
Description: Default sales price list for account

Name: PurchaseCurrency
Description: Currency of purchase Take notes: If the currency code input is not in the active currencies, the value will be set to empty.

Name: PurchaseLeadDays
Description: Indicates number of days required to receive a purchase. Acts as a default

Name: PurchaseVATCode
Description: Default VAT code used for purchase entries

Name: RecepientOfCommissions
Description: Define the relation that should be taken in the official document of the rewarding fiscal fiches Belcotax

Name: Reseller
Description: ID of the reseller account. Conditions: the target account must have the property IsReseller turned on

Name: SalesCurrency
Description: Currency of Sales used for Time & Billing Take notes: If the currency code input is not in the active currencies, the value will be set to empty.

Name: SalesVATCode
Description: Default VAT code for a sales entry

Name: SeparateInvPerSubscription
Description: Indicates how invoices are generated from subscriptions. 0 = subscriptions belonging to the same customer are combined in a single invoice. 1 = each subscription results in one invoice. In both cases, each individual subscription line results in one invoice line

Name: ShippingLeadDays
Description: Indicates the number of days it takes to send goods to the customer. Acts as a default

Name: ShowRemarkForSales
Description: Indicates whether to display Ordered by account's remarks when creating a new sales order

Name: StartDate
Description: Indicates in combination with the end date if the account is active

Name: State
Description: State/Province/County code When changing the Country and the State is filled, the State must be assigned with a valid value from the selected country or set to empty

Name: Status
Description: If the status field is filled this means the account is a customer. The value indicates the customer status. Possible values: A=None, S=Suspect, P=Prospect, C=Customer

Name: TradeName
Description: Trade name can be registered and shown with the client (for all legislations)

Name: Type
Description: Account type: Values: A = Relation, D = Division

Name: UniqueTaxpayerReference
Description: Unique taxpayer reference for UK legislation

Name: VATLiability
Description: Indicates the VAT status of an account to be able to identify the relation that should be selected in the VAT debtor listing in Belgium

Name: VATNumber
Description: The number under which the account is known at the Value Added Tax collection agency
